---
# title: "Introduction to Programming"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.course-hero}
# Introduction to Programming

::: {.subtitle}
University of St. Gallen — Spring 2026
:::

::: {.meta}
Yvan Richard · Lectures & Summaries
:::
:::

## Lecture Notes

Each week's summary covers the key concepts from that week's lecture.

<div class="lecture-grid">
<a class="lecture-card" href="lectures/week_01/summary_01.html">
<span class="week-label">Week 01</span>
<span class="week-title">Getting Started</span>
<span class="week-topics">The terminal · IDEs · Python &amp; environments · uv</span>
</a>
<a class="lecture-card" href="lectures/week_02/summary_02.html">
<span class="week-label">Week 02</span>
<span class="week-title">Introduction to Git</span>
<span class="week-topics">Version control · Git · GitHub</span>
</a>
<a class="lecture-card" href="lectures/week_03/summary_03.html">
<span class="week-label">Week 03</span>
<span class="week-title">Git and GitHub for Collaboration</span>
<span class="week-topics">Remotes · Branches · Pull requests</span>
</a>
<a class="lecture-card" href="lectures/week_04/summary_04.html">
<span class="week-label">Week 04</span>
<span class="week-title">Introduction to Python</span>
<span class="week-topics">Data Structures & Types · Control Flow · Functions</span>
</a>
<a class="lecture-card" href="lectures/week_07/summary_07.html">
<span class="week-label">Week 07</span>
<span class="week-title">Object-Oriented Programming</span>
<span class="week-topics">Classes · Inheritance · Polymorphism</span>
</a>
</div>


---

::: {style="font-size: 1rem; color: #595959; margin-top: 2rem;"}
© 2026 Yvan Richard

*Based on lectures by Dr. Franziska Bender and Dr. Aurélien Sallin.*
:::
